glosses.ja: 飲み込む; 貪り食う

translations.en: I'm scarfing my sandwich too fast.
translations.es: Estoy devorando mi sándwich demasiado rápido.
translations.de: Ich schlinge mein Sandwich zu schnell runter.
translations.it: Mi sto trangugiando il panino troppo in fretta.
translations.ko: 난 샌드위치를 너무 빨리 먹고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把三明治吃得太快了。
translations.yue: 我食個三文治食得太快。
translations.ru: Я слишком быстро уплетаю свой сэндвич.
translations.pt: Estou devorando meu sanduíche rápido demais.
translations.he: אני זולל את הסנדוויץ' שלי מהר מדי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang ngấu nghiến chiếc bánh mì quá nhanh.
translations.nl: Ik werk mijn broodje veel te snel naar innen.
translations.uk: Я занадто швидко з'їдаю свій сендвіч.
translations.hi: मैं اپنا सैंडविच बहुत तेजी से निगल रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Καταβροχθίζω το σάντουιτς μου πολύ γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Jeg sluker sandwichen min altfor fort.
translations.sv: Jag slänger i mig min macka alldeles för fort.
translations.da: Jeg sluger min sandwich alt for hurtigt.
translations.ja: サンドイッチを急いでかき込んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb (present indicative, 1st person singular) of 'engloutir' with the subject clitic 'je' elided to j' before a vowel-initial verb.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), agreeing with the masculine singular noun it modifies.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Degree adverb meaning 'too (much)'; intensifies the manner adverb that follows.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb, indicating speed.

sentences.target: Tu engloutis les chips devant la télé.
sentences.reading: /ty ɑ̃ɡlu.ti le ʃips dəvɑ̃ la tele/

translations.fr: Tu engloutis les chips devant la télé.
translations.ipa: /ty ɑ̃ɡlu.ti le ʃips dəvɑ̃ la tele/
translations.en: You wolf down chips in front of the TV.
translations.es: Te zampas las patatas fritas frente a la tele.
translations.de: Du verschlingst Chips vor dem Fernseher.
translations.it: Ti sbafi le patatine davanti alla TV.
translations.ko: 너는 TV 앞에서 감자칩을 허겁지겁 먹어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在电视前狼吞虎咽地吃薯片。
translations.yue: 你喺電視前面狂食薯片。
translations.pt: Você devora batatas fritas na frente da TV.
translations.vi: Bạn ngấu nghiến khoai tây chiên trước TV.
translations.ar: أنت تلتهم رقائق البطاطس أمام التلفاز.
translations.nl: Je werkt chips weg voor de tv.
translations.hu: A tévé előtt habzsolod a csipszet.
translations.hi: तुम टीवी के सामने चिप्स धड़ाधड़ खा लेते हो.
translations.id: Kamu melahap keripik di depan TV.
translations.sv: Du vräker i dig chips framför tv:n.
translations.ja: テレビの前でポテトチップスをがつがつ食べतेいる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular).
Finite verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular) of 'engloutir'.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, plural (loanword); direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the prepositional object.
Common noun (abbreviation of 'télévision'); object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: On va engloutir une pizza familiale.

translations.fr: On va engloutir une pizza familiale.
translations.en: We're going to devour a family pizza.
translations.es: Vamos a devorar una pizza familiar.
translations.it: Stiamo per divorare una pizza formato famiglia.
translations.ko: 우린 패밀리 피자를 다 먹어치울 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要吃掉一份家庭装披萨。
translations.yue: 我哋會食晒一個家庭裝薄餅。
translations.pt: Vamos devorar uma pizza tamanho família.
translations.tr: Bir aile boyu pizzayı mideye indireceğiz.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sắp ăn hết một chiếc pizza cỡ gia đình.
translations.hu: Be fogunk falni egy családi pizzát.
translations.hi: हम एक फैमिली पिज़्ज़ा चट करने वाले हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε να καταβροχθίσουμε μια οικογενειακή πίτσα.
translations.id: Kita akan melahap satu pizza ukuran keluarga.
translations.sv: Vi ska trycka i oss en familjepizza.
translations.ro: O să devorăm o pizza de familie.
translations.ja: みんなでファミリーサイズのピザを平らげるつもりだ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun, often used colloquially for 'we' (3rd person singular agreement).
Auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person singular) forming the near future ('futur proche').
Infinitive verb complement of the auxiliary 'aller'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the infinitive.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'pizza' (size/type).

translations.en: This renovation is swallowing up our savings.
translations.es: Esta reforma se está comiendo nuestros ahorros.
translations.it: Questa ristrutturazione si sta mangiando i nostri risparmi.
translations.ko: 이 공사는 우리의 저축을 갉아먹고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 这次装修正在吞噬我们的积蓄。
translations.yue: 呢次裝修喺度食緊我哋嘅積蓄。
translations.pt: Esta reforma está engolindo nossas economias.
translations.he: השיפוץ הזה בולע לנו את החסכונות.
translations.vi: Việc sửa nhà này đang nuốt chửng tiền tiết kiệm của chúng ta.
translations.nl: Deze verbouwing slokt ons spaargeld op.
translations.hu: Ez a felújítás felemészti a megtakarításainkat.
translations.hi: यह नवीनीकरण हमारी बचत को निगल रहा है.
translations.el: Αυτή η ανακαίνιση καταβροχθίζει τις οικονομίες μας.
translations.sv: Den här renoveringen slukar våra besparingar.
translations.ja: このリフォームは私たちの貯金を食いつぶしている。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, plural; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, plural (irregular plural of 'travail'); subject of the verb.
Finite verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural) of 'engloutir'.
Possessive determiner, plural; modifies the object noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
